hooks.command: MAIN=/Users/pablolires/Desktop/Code/app-ppa; find "$MAIN/.claude/worktrees" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d | while read -r wt; do [ ! -L "$wt/vendor" ] && rm -rf "$wt/vendor" && ln -sf "$MAIN/vendor" "$wt/vendor"; [ ! -L "$wt/node_modules" ] && rm -rf "$wt/node_modules" && ln -sf "$MAIN/node_modules" "$wt/node_modules"; [ ! -L "$wt/public/build" ] && rm -rf "$wt/public/build" && ln -sf "$MAIN/public/build" "$wt/public/build"; [ ! -e "$wt/.env" ] && ln -sf "$MAIN/.env" "$wt/.env"; [ ! -e "$wt/resources/images" ] && ln -sf "$MAIN/resources/images" "$wt/resources/images"; done
